# First Auto-Generated Venture Design Sample

**Category**: Report | **Status**: Approved | **Version**: 1.0.0 | **Author**: Fable design-authoring tier (SD-LEO-FEAT-AUTHOR-VENTURE-DESIGN-001) | **Last Updated**: 2026-07-06 | **Tags**: design-authoring, watch-and-review, design_quality_v1

`first-generated-sample-datadistill.html` is the **WATCH-AND-REVIEW smoke evidence (TS-6)** for
SD-LEO-FEAT-AUTHOR-VENTURE-DESIGN-001 — the first venture landing generated through the
enriched design instruction block (`design-generation-inputs.json` rendered by
`buildDesignInstructionBlock`), by the Fable model the S17 executor slot now resolves to.
Open it directly in a browser (light + dark, resize to mobile).

## Provenance (real corpus only — venture DataDistill 510177ba)

| Section | Source artifact |
|---------|-----------------|
| Hero headline / subhead / tagline / 4 feature messages | `blueprint_positioning_brief` 64e7da5b (current revision) |
| Tokens (Inter, #1E3A8A primary, #14B8A6 accent, funnel logo spec) | `identity_naming_visual` e3647c5d / `identity_logo_image` e0099e79 |
| Objection answers / credibility band | `identity_persona_brand` f14e1394 + positioning statement |

**MISS ledger (guardrail honored — real data or OMIT):** social proof / customer logos /
testimonials / usage counts (no real customers exist → omitted); pricing or free-tier claims
(no pricing facts → none made); reduction-ratio numbers (corpus claims integrity preservation,
not magnitudes → product depiction shows parity checks only).

## Independent score (scorer != builder — design-agent, design_quality_v1 rubric 9c9c60a7)

| Cycle | Mean | Verdict | Evidence row |
|-------|------|---------|--------------|
| 1 | 4.00 | CONDITIONAL_PASS (4 non-blocking findings: focus-ring contrast, Inter declared-not-loaded, emoji glyphs, trust ceiling) | `bdb1e6d7` |
| 2 (findings fixed) | **4.50** | **PASS** — all dims >= 3, zero blockers, fabrication sweep CLEAN, 6/9 conversion principles, motion grammar PASS | `fdbd52bc` |

This sample is a **chairman taste-review checkpoint**, not auto-trusted output — per the
SD's WATCH-AND-REVIEW constraint, broad trust in the generator requires the chairman's verdict.
